faqs.question: What services do you offer?
faqs.answer: We offer a wide range of business services tailored to your needs. Contact us for a personalized consultation.

faqs.question: What are your business hours?
faqs.answer: We are open Monday to Friday, 9 AM - 6 PM, and Saturday 10 AM - 4 PM.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: Just tell me you'd like to book an appointment and I'll walk you through the process right here on WhatsApp!

faqs.question: How much do your services cost?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on the specific service. Share what you need and I'll give you accurate pricing.

faqs.question: Do you offer refunds?
faqs.answer: Yes — we stand behind our work. Please contact us within 48 hours of service for any concerns.

faqs.question: Where are you located?
faqs.answer: We operate online and have a physical location. Message us for our current address.

faqs.question: How can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Share your order number and I'll look it up for you right away!

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery?
faqs.answer: Yes — we offer delivery within our service area. Additional fees may apply based on distance.

faqs.question: How do I cancel an appointment?
faqs.answer: Just tell me your appointment ID and I'll cancel it for you immediately.

faqs.question: Do you have a loyalty program?
faqs.answer: Yes! Ask about our loyalty program when you book your first appointment.
